headline: The Trade Desk (TTD) Declines More Than Market: Some Information for Investors
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, The Trade Desk (TTD) stood at $21.28, denoting a -2.12% move from the preceding trading day.

headline: Why Is The Trade Desk (TTD) Down 9.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: The Trade Desk (TTD) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Think Trump's War Crash Isn't Bad Yet? 5 Big Stocks Implode 60%
summary: President Donald Trump's war-mongering in Iran is backfiring — on S&P 500 investors. Despite sharp spikes in energy stocks, the much-watched Nasdaq composite index sank more than 43 points Thursday, pushing it into correction territory.
